old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-nivr","title":"[codereview] Gateway does not call handle_frame_rpl on incoming mesh frames; DAOs ignored by root router","description":"In forward_mesh_to_upstream and run_* functions, only mesh_to_upstream (SCHC decompress) is used. No call to node.handle_frame_rpl(l2_payload, \u0026mut reply, now_ms) which is required to process RPL_ICMPV6 DAO messages and update routes via process_dao. Root must consume DAOs to populate RoutingTable for is_local_mesh and SRH downward routing. Add now_ms param (trickle timers) and integrate RplEvent handling. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-ybf4","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T15:55:06.087720123Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T15:55:06.087720123Z","labels":["codereview"]}
